<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Move-in event"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/pms/events/move-in"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Event-oriented endpoint for sources that receive one move-in at a time and cannot produce full unit state.

Creates the unit if it doesn't exist (stamping `source_type='push'`). Upserts the tenant by `(company_id, pms_tenant_id)`. Sets `occupied=true`. Stamps `move_in_date`.

Idempotent via the `Idempotency-Key` header.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
